|     | Label of the variable   | Full name of the variable                                                               | Explanation and remarks                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Original label of the variable (French)   |
|----:|:------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:------------------------------------------|
|   1 | dist_tosea              | Distance of the property to the nearest seashore - capped at 10km                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | distance_ltm                              |
|   2 | dist_tosea_corr         | Corrected distance of the property to the nearest seashore - capped at 10km             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | distance_ltm_corr                         |
|   3 | farea                   | Reported floor area of the property                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dsupdc                                    |
|   4 | has_cheating            | If the property has access to central heating                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | gchclc                                    |
|   5 | has_elec                | If the property has access to electricity                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | gelelc                                    |
|   6 | has_elevator            | If the building of the flat has an elevator                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | gasclc                                    |
|   7 | has_gas                 | If the building is connected to the gas mains                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | ggazlc                                    |
|   8 | has_mdrainage           | If the property is connected to the mains drainage system                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | gteglc                                    |
|   9 | has_rchute              | If the property has a refuse chute                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | gvorlc                                    |
|  10 | has_water               | If the property has access to water                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | geaulc                                    |
|  11 | n_ancrooms              | Number of ancillary rooms reported in the property                                      | Ancillary rooms include hallways, attics. They differ from n_otherannex.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | dnbann                                    |
|  12 | n_attic                 | Number of attics reported in the property                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | nb_greniers/ffnbpaut                      |
|  13 | n_basmt                 | Number of basements reported in the property                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | nb_caves/ffnbpaut                         |
|  14 | n_bath                  | Number of bathtubs reported in the property                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbbai                                    |
|  15 | n_eatr                  | Number of eating rooms reported in the property                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbsam                                    |
|  16 | n_floors                | Number of floor in the property (building or house)                                     | This variable is more reliable with houses than with buildings. Underground floors encoding is not fully harmonized and is often equal to 81 for minus 1, 82 for minus 2 ... It can also be encoded as 99, 98. A flat at the 2nd floor of a seven-floors building should be encoded with nth_floor=1 and n_floors=8 (ground floor and seven floors above ground level)                                                                                  | dnbniv                                    |
|  17 | n_garage                | Number of garages reported in the property                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | nb_garages/ffnbpgarag                     |
|  18 | n_kit8                  | Number of kitchens reported in the property with an area of less than 8 square meters   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbcu8                                    |
|  19 | n_kit9                  | Number of kitchens reported in the property with an area of larger than 9 square meters |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbcu9                                    |
|  20 | n_mrooms                | Number of main rooms reported in the property                                           | n_mrooms = n_eatr + n_slr + n_kit8 + n_kit9 + n_washr                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | dnbppr                                    |
|  21 | n_otherannex            | Number of other annexes reported in the property                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | nb_autresdep                              |
|  22 | n_pool                  | Number of pools reported in the property                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | nb_piscines/ffnbppisci                    |
|  23 | n_rooms                 | Number of rooms reported in the property                                                | n_rooms = n_mrooms + n_annex                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | dnbpdc                                    |
|  24 | n_show                  | Number of showers reported in the property                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbdou                                    |
|  25 | n_sink                  | Number of sinks reported in the property                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnblav                                    |
|  26 | n_slr                   | Number of sleeping rooms reported in the property                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbcha                                    |
|  27 | n_terrace               | Number of terraces reported in the property                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | nb_terrasses/ffnbpterra                   |
|  28 | n_washr                 | Number of washing rooms reported in the property                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbsea                                    |
|  29 | n_wc                    | Number of toilets reported in the property                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnbwc                                     |
|  30 | nth_floor               | Reported floor of the property                                                          | It represents the floor of the flat (in France, the second floor is the first floor above ground level). This variable is set to 00 for houses. Underground floors encoding is not fully harmonized and is often equal to 81 for minus 1, 82 for minus 2 ... It can also be encoded as 99, 98. A flat at the 2nd floor of a seven-floors building should be encoded with nth_floor=1 and n_floors=8 (ground floor and seven floors above ground level). | dniv                                      |
|  31 | nth_floor_rel           | Relative floor of the property (from 0, ground floor, to 1, last floor)                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | dnivrel                                   |
|  32 | price                   | Price of the transaction                                                                | Price of the transaction is in EUR                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | valeurfonc                                |
|  33 | price_sqm               | Price per square meter of the transaction                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | price_sqm                                 |
|  34 | prop_loc_               | Official city's code where the property is located                                      | see remarks above                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | depcom                                    |
|  35 | prop_loc_dep            | Department code where the property is located                                           | Data doesn't cover the whole French territory - overseas territory are included but Alsace-Moselle (Eastern part of France) isn't                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | ccodep                                    |
|  36 | prop_loc_x              | Longitude where the property is located                                                 | see remarks above                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | x                                         |
|  37 | prop_loc_y              | Latitude where the property is located                                                  | see remarks above                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | y                                         |
|  38 | prop_type               | Type of property                                                                        | 1 represents a flat and 2 a house                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | dteloc                                    |
|  39 | prop_year               | Year of contruction of the property                                                     | This variable has been harmonized to correct for typing mistakes. More details is available in the introduction.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | jannath                                   |
|  40 | s_land_agri             | Agricultural land area (square meters)                                                  | Agricultural land is used for farming. It includes fields, meadows, orchards and vineyards.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | dcntagri                                  |
|  41 | s_land_artif            | Artificial land area (square meters)                                                    | Artificial land includes recreational areas, land, building plots and gardens. Artificial land refers to land that has been altered by humans.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | dcntsol                                   |
|  42 | s_land_nat              | Natural land area (square meters)                                                       | Natural land is land that has not been altered. This includes, for example, forests.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | dcntnat                                   |
|  43 | stair                   | If the property has stairs                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | gesclc                                    |
|  44 | trans_date              | Date of the official certified transaction                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | datemut                                   |
|  45 | trans_id                | Unique identifier code of the transaction                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | idmutation                                |
|  46 | trans_month             | Month of the official certified transaction                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | moismut                                   |
|  47 | trans_type_code         | Type of transaction                                                                     | There are several types of transaction in the original data (sale, off-plan sale, sale of building land, tender, compulsory purchase). Original data have been filtered to keep only sale.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | idnatmut                                  |
|  48 | trans_type_label        | Type of transaction                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | libnatmut                                 |
|  49 | trans_year              | Year of the official certified transaction                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | anneemut                                  |
